Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gregory P. Brock, Esq., Law Office, 510-841-1171, for Intervenor and moving party

No other appearance. Tentative ruling is adopted.
OTHER RISOTTO, INC. AND BAHMAN TEHRANI'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Permission To Sue Receiver Richard B. Cole is Granted. No opposition filed. The moving party has permission to sue Mr. Cole in the Contra Costa County action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
